---
title: "GV300 Assignment 6"
description: "My Portfolio"
output: distill::distill_article
---

<div style="padding: 14px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; margin-bottom: 32px; font-size: 16px;">
  <a href="index.html" style="margin-right: 22px; text-decoration: none;">Home</a>
  <a href="showcase.html" style="margin-right: 22px; text-decoration: none;">Showcase</a>
  <a href="text_analysis.html" style="margin-right: 22px; text-decoration: none;">Text Analysis</a>
  <a href="postcard.html" style="text-decoration: none;">About Me</a>
</div>

## Welcome

Hi, I’m Adam, a Politics and International Relations student at the University of Essex.

This site is a small portfolio of my work in quantitative political analysis. It shows how data, statistical coding, text analysis and visualisation can be used to explore questions in political behaviour and communication.

You can view examples of this work in the [Showcase](showcase.html) and [Text Analysis](textanalyis.html) sections, or learn more about me in [About Me](postcard.html).
